title: Hierarchy of Algebraic Structures Leading to Groups
description: A flowchart showing the relationship between fundamental algebraic structures, highlighting how a Group is defined and its connection to other structures, based on Pearson Education's common Discrete Mathematics curriculum.
relationships: A Magma is a Set with a binary operation
A Semigroup is a Magma where the operation is associative
A Monoid is a Semigroup with an identity element
A Group is a Monoid where every element has an inverse
An Abelian Group is a Group where the operation is commutative
